name: stereoframe
description: Declarative, deterministic 3D video on three.js — scaffold, lint, validate, and render compositions built for AI agents.

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --format esm --target node --external puppeteer --external stereoframe-runtime/vocab --banner '#!/usr/bin/env node' && chmod +x dist/cli.js
